TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-childhood_micang 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: a yaku a mpprengoku saya so nodaanmu a.
S.PHON: a jaku a mppɾeŋoku saja so nodaanmu a.
S.FORM: a yaku a mpprengoku saya so nodaanmu a.
S.PHON: a jaku a mppɾeŋoku saja so nodaanmu a.
S.TRANSL: 今天呢,我要來說說我的經歷.
Now, I would like to talk about my experience.

S.FORM: so sbiciq cbeyo a a kndalaxku so nakahara yonenseku a meyah kndalax nakahara meyahku alang tongan hini.
S.PHON: so sbiʦiq ʦbejo a a kndalaxku so nakaħaɾa jonenseku a mejaħ kndalax nakaħaɾa mejaħku alaŋ toŋan ħini.
S.FORM: so sbiciq cbeyo a a kndalaxku so nakahara yonenseku a meyah kndalax nakahara meyahku alang tongan hini.
S.PHON: so sbiʦiq ʦbejo a a kndalaxku so nakaħaɾa jonenseku a mejaħ kndalax nakaħaɾa mejaħku alaŋ toŋan ħini.
S.TRANSL: 過去,我小時候呢,四年級時就從中原部落來到眉溪部落這裡.
In the past, as a child, I had come from Nakahara- I was in the fourth grade then- and came to Tongan here.

S.FORM: a mesa ka tamabubumu a uN nita tongan da gaga hii kana ka so dheranta ma a iyata eniq anu ka naka nakahara hini de uka a uka phumaan bunga mesa to qahur mesa to btunux ka nakahara mesa ma.
S.PHON: a mesa ka tamabubumu a un nita toŋan da gaga ħii kana ka so dħeɾanta ma a ijata eniq anu ka naka nakaħaɾa ħini de uka a uka pħumaan buŋa mesa to qaħuɾ mesa to btunux ka nakaħaɾa mesa ma.
S.FORM: a mesa ka tamabubumu a uN nita tongan da gaga hii kana ka so dheranta ma a iyata eniq anu ka naka nakahara hini de uka a uka phumaan bunga mesa to qahur mesa to btunux ka nakahara mesa ma.
S.PHON: a mesa ka tamabubumu a un nita toŋan da gaga ħii kana ka so dħeɾanta ma a ijata eniq anu ka naka nakaħaɾa ħini de uka a uka pħumaan buŋa mesa to qaħuɾ mesa to btunux ka nakaħaɾa mesa ma.
S.TRANSL: 我的父母就說:"我們到眉溪吧!我們的土地都在那邊!我們別留在中原這裡了!中原這裡沒有地方種植地瓜,因為土地很貧瘠."
So my parents said: "Let's go to Tongan! All our land is over there! Let's not stay in Nakahara here. There's no place for us to plant sweet potatoes, because the land is infertile."

S.FORM: kika meyahmiyan tongan hini di ma meyahmiyan nanaq a.
S.PHON: kika mejaħmijan toŋan ħini di ma mejaħmijan nanaq a.
S.FORM: kika meyahmiyan tongan hini di ma meyahmiyan nanaq a.
S.PHON: kika mejaħmijan toŋan ħini di ma mejaħmijan nanaq a.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們就來到眉溪這邊,我們就自己來了.
So we came down to Tongan here, and we came on our own.

S.FORM: uN anu ka kmeepah dherannami di.
S.PHON: un anu ka kmeepaħ dħeɾannami di.
S.FORM: uN anu ka kmeepah dherannami di.
S.PHON: un anu ka kmeepaħ dħeɾannami di.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們在我們自己的土地上工作了.
Then we worked on our own land.

S.FORM: kika mesa ka bubumu a a micang sa as ata mhuma bunga ho sa a dm a ##sbsawan da hata mhuma bunga si ma.
S.PHON: kika mesa ka bubumu a a miʦaŋ sa as ata mħuma buŋa ħo sa a dm a ##sbsawan da ħata mħuma buŋa si ma.
S.FORM: kika mesa ka bubumu a a micang sa as ata mhuma bunga ho sa a dm a ##sbsawan da hata mhuma bunga si ma.
S.PHON: kika mesa ka bubumu a a miʦaŋ sa as ata mħuma buŋa ħo sa a dm a ##sbsawan da ħata mħuma buŋa si ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後,我媽媽說:"Micang, 我們去種地瓜吧!" 天氣已經較溫和了,我們來種地瓜吧,她說.
Then, my mother said: "Micang, let's go plant some sweet potatoes!" The weather's cooler now, and let's go plant sweet potatoes, she sai."

S.FORM: iniku kela mhuma bunga mapaku bruru ma.
S.PHON: iniku kela mħuma buŋa mapaku bɾuɾu ma.
S.FORM: iniku kela mhuma bunga mapaku bruru ma.
S.PHON: iniku kela mħuma buŋa mapaku bɾuɾu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我不會種番薯,而我用背扛著背簍.
I didn't know how to plant sweet potatoes, and I was carrying a basket on my back.

S.FORM: asimu osai rmemux daha ka bung a waso ma rima ka waso mnenaq bruru di ma.
S.PHON: asimu osai ɾmemux daħa ka buŋ a waso ma ɾima ka waso mnenaq bɾuɾu di ma.
S.FORM: asimu osai rmemux daha ka bung a waso ma rima ka waso mnenaq bruru di ma.
S.PHON: asimu osai ɾmemux daħa ka buŋ a waso ma ɾima ka waso mnenaq bɾuɾu di ma.

TRANSL.notes: 我馬上迅速地塞了幾根籃子裡的蕃薯藤(到土裡).

S.TRANSL: 我馬上迅速地塞了幾根籃子裡的蕃薯藤 .

TRANSL.notes: I immediately stick (into the dirt) a couple of sweet potato rattans which were in the basket.

S.TRANSL: I immediately stick a couple of sweet potato rattans which were in the basket.

S.FORM: mheduku di bubu kesaunmu.
S.PHON: mħeduku di bubu kesaunmu.
S.FORM: mheduku di bubu kesaunmu.
S.PHON: mħeduku di bubu kesaunmu.
S.TRANSL: 我說,「媽媽!我種完啦!」
"Mom, I have finished planting!" I said.

S.FORM: mosa kus mosa meyah mita bubumu.
S.PHON: mosa kus mosa mejaħ mita bubumu.
S.FORM: mosa kus mosa meyah mita bubumu.
S.PHON: mosa kus mosa mejaħ mita bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 接著媽媽來看
Then my mother came to see.

S.FORM: ga inu masu wada qheduun rmeus kana ka wahin bunga nii di si ma.
S.PHON: ga inu masu wada qħeduun ɾmeus kana ka waħin buŋa nii di si ma.
S.FORM: ga inu masu wada qheduun rmeus kana ka wahin bunga nii di si ma.
S.PHON: ga inu masu wada qħeduun ɾmeus kana ka waħin buŋa nii di si ma.
S.TRANSL: 她說:「什麼?你怎麼把所有的地瓜枝葉全給掩埋啦?」
"What? How come you burried all these sweet potato rattans?", she said.

S.FORM: ma teru ba pnhumaansu gheti wa nodaan kingan bruru biciq nii mesa ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: ma teɾu ba pnħumaansu għeti wa nodaan kiŋan bɾuɾu biʦiq nii mesa ka bubumu ma.
S.FORM: ma teru ba pnhumaansu gheti wa nodaan kingan bruru biciq nii mesa ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: ma teɾu ba pnħumaansu għeti wa nodaan kiŋan bɾuɾu biʦiq nii mesa ka bubumu ma.

TRANSL.notes: 她說著:「妳怎麼只有種三(棵)呀?這個小背簍(裡的番薯藤)妳是可以種很大一片地的!」

S.TRANSL: 她說著:「妳怎麼只有種三 呀?這個小背簍 妳是可以種很大一片地的!」

TRANSL.notes: "Only three? You can actually plant a broad area with (the rattans in) this one basket!", my mother said.

S.TRANSL: "Only three? You can actually plant a broad area with this one basket!", my mother said.

S.FORM: usa da usa sapah di inisu kela inisu kela mhuma bunga.
S.PHON: usa da usa sapaħ di inisu kela inisu kela mħuma buŋa.
S.FORM: usa da usa sapah di inisu kela inisu kela mhuma bunga.
S.PHON: usa da usa sapaħ di inisu kela inisu kela mħuma buŋa.
S.TRANSL: 「走! 回家吧! 妳不會種番薯啦!」
"Go! Go home now! You don't know how to plant sweet potatoes!"

S.FORM: meyahku sap meyahku sapah di ma.
S.PHON: mejaħku sap mejaħku sapaħ di ma.
S.FORM: meyahku sap meyahku sapah di ma.
S.PHON: mejaħku sap mejaħku sapaħ di ma.
S.TRANSL: 我就回家了.
So I came home.

S.FORM: musaku pure ido wa di ma pure ido rumu wa ido macu.
S.PHON: musaku puɾe ido wa di ma puɾe ido ɾumu wa ido maʦu.
S.FORM: musaku pure ido wa di ma pure ido rumu wa ido macu.
S.PHON: musaku puɾe ido wa di ma puɾe ido ɾumu wa ido maʦu.
S.TRANSL: 我就去煮飯了,我煮稀飯,小米粥.
So I went rice cooking, and I cooked porridge, millet prridge.

S.FORM: ma pureku di ma.
S.PHON: ma puɾeku di ma.
S.FORM: ma pureku di ma.
S.PHON: ma puɾeku di ma.
S.TRANSL: 我就煮啦.
So I cooked.

S.FORM: inu dung sqerul dung ido m idomu macu ma.
S.PHON: inu duŋ sqeɾul duŋ ido m idomu maʦu ma.
S.FORM: inu dung sqerul dung ido m idomu macu ma.
S.PHON: inu duŋ sqeɾul duŋ ido m idomu maʦu ma.
S.TRANSL: 可怎麼知道我又燒焦了我的小米.
But, I don't know why, again my millet was burned!

S.FORM: eyahunkuna mseyang dung bubumu.
S.PHON: ejaħunkuna msejaŋ duŋ bubumu.
S.FORM: eyahunkuna mseyang dung bubumu.
S.PHON: ejaħunkuna msejaŋ duŋ bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽又回來對我生氣.
Again, my mother came to me angry.

S.FORM: maanu sqerulna ido mac ido nii dungan huwa kesaun mekan ka sqerul si bubumu ma.
S.PHON: maanu sqeɾulna ido maʦ ido nii duŋan ħuwa kesaun mekan ka sqeɾul si bubumu ma.
S.FORM: maanu sqerulna ido mac ido nii dungan huwa kesaun mekan ka sqerul si bubumu ma.
S.PHON: maanu sqeɾulna ido maʦ ido nii duŋan ħuwa kesaun mekan ka sqeɾul si bubumu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽說:「妳怎麼又把飯燒焦? 已經煮到這樣焦了的稀飯,怎麼吃啊?」
"Why did you burn the rice again? How do you eat the singe like this?", my mother said.

S.FORM: ma uxeku pure dhenu wa iniku kela pure da kesaunmu hi ma.
S.PHON: ma uxeku puɾe dħenu wa iniku kela puɾe da kesaunmu ħi ma.
S.FORM: ma uxeku pure dhenu wa iniku kela pure da kesaunmu hi ma.
S.PHON: ma uxeku puɾe dħenu wa iniku kela puɾe da kesaunmu ħi ma.
S.TRANSL: 結果我就不煮了.於是我就對她說:「 我不會煮飯!」
So I didn't cook, as a result. "I don't know how to cook!" I said to her.

S.FORM: ma usa mangan a qucun da meyah pure sa bubumu ma.
S.PHON: ma usa maŋan a quʦun da mejaħ puɾe sa bubumu ma.
S.FORM: ma usa mangan a qucun da meyah pure sa bubumu ma.
S.PHON: ma usa maŋan a quʦun da mejaħ puɾe sa bubumu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽說了:「去採陸喬!」,她就過來煮.
Coming here to cook, my mother said "Go take some shallots!".

S.FORM: mhada ka ido dheya di ma musamiyan mangan qucun di ma bunga tumun di ma bunga tumun di ma damacnami ido ma ma anu ka a sari.
S.PHON: mħada ka ido dħeja di ma musamijan maŋan quʦun di ma buŋa tumun di ma buŋa tumun di ma damaʦnami ido ma ma anu ka a saɾi.
S.FORM: mhada ka ido dheya di ma musamiyan mangan qucun di ma bunga tumun di ma bunga tumun di ma damacnami ido ma ma anu ka a sari.
S.PHON: mħada ka ido dħeja di ma musamijan maŋan quʦun di ma buŋa tumun di ma buŋa tumun di ma damaʦnami ido ma ma anu ka a saɾi.
S.TRANSL: 煮的飯熟了之後,我們就去採陸喬、圓番薯、南瓜還有芋頭來配飯吃.
The rice was already cooked, so we went out to pluck shallots, round sweet potatoes, pumpkins, and taros as side dishes.

S.FORM: a hanna maribu a manganna ludux bubumu ma ludux bubumu ma bobo ido hii ka.
S.PHON: a ħanna maɾibu a maŋanna ludux bubumu ma ludux bubumu ma bobo ido ħii ka.
S.FORM: a hanna maribu a manganna ludux bubumu ma ludux bubumu ma bobo ido hii ka.
S.PHON: a ħanna maɾibu a maŋanna ludux bubumu ma ludux bubumu ma bobo ido ħii ka.

TRANSL.notes: 我媽媽先採(所採我們剛採的作物的)嫩葉,放在飯的上面.

S.TRANSL: 我媽媽先採 嫩葉,放在飯的上面.

TRANSL.notes: First, my mother would take the sprouts (of those we just plucked) and put them on the top of the rice.

S.TRANSL: First, my mother would take the sprouts and put them on the top of the rice.

S.FORM: anu ka tarux kiya di ma gimaxunna ido hii ka tarux bubumu ma.
S.PHON: anu ka taɾux kija di ma gimaxunna ido ħii ka taɾux bubumu ma.
S.FORM: anu ka tarux kiya di ma gimaxunna ido hii ka tarux bubumu ma.
S.PHON: anu ka taɾux kija di ma gimaxunna ido ħii ka taɾux bubumu ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後,我媽媽就把芋頭莖攪拌到飯裡.
Then, my mother would mix some sweet potato stem into that rice.

S.FORM: a malu ba puqiun ka ido a ido macu snhaya gmimax ka puqun.
S.PHON: a malu ba puqiun ka ido a ido maʦu snħaja gmimax ka puqun.
S.FORM: a malu ba puqiun ka ido a ido macu snhaya gmimax ka puqun.
S.PHON: a malu ba puqiun ka ido a ido maʦu snħaja gmimax ka puqun.
S.TRANSL: 小米那樣子攪拌的話真的很好吃.
The millet tastes really good if you mix it that way.

S.FORM: ma paruku hari de wadaku mkela meepah di ma.
S.PHON: ma paɾuku ħaɾi de wadaku mkela meepaħ di ma.
S.FORM: ma paruku hari de wadaku mkela meepah di ma.
S.PHON: ma paɾuku ħaɾi de wadaku mkela meepaħ di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後,等我長大了一點,我就能工作了.
Then, as I grew a little older, I was able to work.

S.FORM: nita wadaku gonense da rokunen.
S.PHON: nita wadaku gonense da ɾokunen.
S.FORM: nita wadaku gonense da rokunen.
S.PHON: nita wadaku gonense da ɾokunen.
S.TRANSL: 當時我大約五、六年級.
I was in about fifth or sixth grade then.

S.FORM: nita di si bubumu a pahaeta smkeguy di sa.
S.PHON: nita di si bubumu a paħaeta smkeguj di sa.
S.FORM: nita di si bubumu a pahaeta smkeguy di sa.
S.PHON: nita di si bubumu a paħaeta smkeguj di sa.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽就說:「來吧!我們來剝麻!」
"Let's go!" my mother said "Let's do ramie peeling, then"

S.FORM: uh pahaeta maku tmgesa smkeguy si ma ma t tminun ma mnuqah tgesaunkuna bubumu ma.
S.PHON: uħ paħaeta maku tmgesa smkeguj si ma ma t tminun ma mnuqaħ tgesaunkuna bubumu ma.
S.FORM: uh pahaeta maku tmgesa smkeguy si ma ma t tminun ma mnuqah tgesaunkuna bubumu ma.
S.PHON: uħ paħaeta maku tmgesa smkeguj si ma ma t tminun ma mnuqaħ tgesaunkuna bubumu ma.
S.TRANSL: 她說:「我來教妳剝麻、編織和捻絲吧!」我媽媽說:「我教妳!」.
"Let me teach you how to do ramie-peeling, weaving, and thread-twisting" she said. "I'll teach you" my mother said .

S.FORM: ma a dmaus ma iniku kela anu ka dmaus ma.
S.PHON: ma a dmaus ma iniku kela anu ka dmaus ma.
S.FORM: ma a dmaus ma iniku kela anu ka dmaus ma.
S.PHON: ma a dmaus ma iniku kela anu ka dmaus ma.
S.TRANSL: 至於整理經線呢,我不會整理經線.
As for organizing threads, I didn't know how to do it.

S.FORM: bbeunna bagamu dungan masu ini kela dmaus si.
S.PHON: bbeunna bagamu duŋan masu ini kela dmaus si.
S.FORM: bbeunna bagamu dungan masu ini kela dmaus si.
S.PHON: bbeunna bagamu duŋan masu ini kela dmaus si.
S.TRANSL: 她又打我的手,說:「你怎麼不會整理經線?」
She hit my hand again, saying "How come you don't know how to organize threads?"

S.FORM: mkelaku ka qnnuqah ma mkelaku tngiya dmaus iniku kela.
S.PHON: mkelaku ka qnnuqaħ ma mkelaku tŋija dmaus iniku kela.
S.FORM: mkelaku ka qnnuqah ma mkelaku tngiya dmaus iniku kela.
S.PHON: mkelaku ka qnnuqaħ ma mkelaku tŋija dmaus iniku kela.
S.TRANSL: 我會捻絲,我會繞麻線.但是,整理經線我就是不會.
I knew how to twist the threads, I knew how to spool the threads. But organizing the threads, I just wasn't able to do it.

S.FORM: ma tminun de mrridih ka bekuyunmu habik lukus habik ma.
S.PHON: ma tminun de mɾɾidiħ ka bekujunmu ħabik lukus ħabik ma.
S.FORM: ma tminun de mrridih ka bekuyunmu habik lukus habik ma.
S.PHON: ma tminun de mɾɾidiħ ka bekujunmu ħabik lukus ħabik ma.
S.TRANSL: 到了我織布的時候,我把織布的腰帶也綁得斜斜的了.
When I started to weave, the belt that I fastened was tilted.

S.FORM: gisu hmuwa tninunsu nii a a bleqi a hmabik ka habiksu ga mridih habiksu kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: gisu ħmuwa tninunsu nii a a bleqi a ħmabik ka ħabiksu ga mɾidiħ ħabiksu kesaunkuna.
S.FORM: gisu hmuwa tninunsu nii a a bleqi a hmabik ka habiksu ga mridih habiksu kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: gisu ħmuwa tninunsu nii a a bleqi a ħmabik ka ħabiksu ga mɾidiħ ħabiksu kesaunkuna.
S.TRANSL: 她對著我說:「妳怎麼織啊?綁腰帶時妳的腰帶一定要綁緊!妳的腰帶歪了!」
"How can you weave like this? You've got to fasten your belt when you wear it! You're belt is tilted!" she said to me.

S.FORM: odaankuna smebuc papak dung ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: odaankuna smebuʦ papak duŋ ka bubumu ma.
S.FORM: odaankuna smebuc papak dung ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: odaankuna smebuʦ papak duŋ ka bubumu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽又來,鞭打我的腳.
My mother came again and whipped on my foot.

S.FORM: lmingisku mesa ka lubimu.
S.PHON: lmiŋisku mesa ka lubimu.
S.FORM: lmingisku mesa ka lubimu.
S.PHON: lmiŋisku mesa ka lubimu.
S.TRANSL: 然後,聽Lubi說,我就哭了.
So I cried, as Lubi said.

S.FORM: iya bbei bubu huwa mesa m.
S.PHON: ija bbei bubu ħuwa mesa m.
S.FORM: iya bbei bubu huwa mesa m.
S.PHON: ija bbei bubu ħuwa mesa m.
S.TRANSL: 「別打她了,媽媽!」
"Don't whip her, mother!"

S.FORM: tminun di ma uxe a pkela tminun a beebuunsu si bubu ma.
S.PHON: tminun di ma uxe a pkela tminun a beebuunsu si bubu ma.
S.FORM: tminun di ma uxe a pkela tminun a beebuunsu si bubu ma.
S.PHON: tminun di ma uxe a pkela tminun a beebuunsu si bubu ma.

TRANSL.notes: Lubi說:「她已經在(學怎麼)織了,如果妳打她,她就學不會了」

S.TRANSL: Lubi說:「她已經在 織了,如果妳打她,她就學不會了」

TRANSL.notes: "She's already weaving (learning how to weave), and she won't be able to do it if you whip her", said Lubi.

S.TRANSL: "She's already weaving , and she won't be able to do it if you whip her", said Lubi.

S.FORM: uN lmngelungku naq di ma thuweku naq tminun di malu ka tnninunmu di ma.
S.PHON: un lmŋeluŋku naq di ma tħuweku naq tminun di malu ka tnninunmu di ma.
S.FORM: uN lmngelungku naq di ma thuweku naq tminun di malu ka tnninunmu di ma.
S.PHON: un lmŋeluŋku naq di ma tħuweku naq tminun di malu ka tnninunmu di ma.

TRANSL.notes: 後來我自己想了想、慢慢地織,最後我的織布(技術)就變好了.

S.TRANSL: 後來我自己想了想、慢慢地織,最後我的織布 就變好了.

TRANSL.notes: So I did a lot of thinking myeslf. Slowly I weaved, and my weaving (skill) became good.

S.TRANSL: So I did a lot of thinking myeslf. Slowly I weaved, and my weaving became good.

S.FORM: o kiya da si bubumu mqaras bubumu ma.

S.TRANSL: 媽媽說:「喔! 可以了!」媽媽很開心.
"Oh! You're good now!", said mother. She was happy.

S.TRANSL: 那個 結束後,我就十五歲了.然後我就去霧社做洋裁的工作.

TRANSL.notes: So after that (my traning for weaving) was finished, I turned fifteen years old. I went to do western dressmaking in Paran.

S.TRANSL: So after that was finished, I turned fifteen years old. I went to do western dressmaking in Paran.

S.TRANSL: 我去製作衣服,像是原住民的衣服,還有漢人所穿的衣服.
I made clothings, like those of the aborigines, and those of the Chinese people.

S.TRANSL: 我就做剪 的工作,但我也是不會.
I did cutting, and I didn't know how to do it either.

I was fifteen years old at that time, and I knew how to tell the measurement of the cloth, which they call one piri/piring. That I know.

I did the cutting too. And I got to know a little about it.

When I first do the cutting, I didn't add five centimeters to the clothing.

Then, when that was finished, when we finished learning western dressmaking, I went home.

S.TRANSL: 然後,我們就去工作賺錢.以前 即使是種香茅也是可以賺錢的.

TRANSL.notes: Then, we went to work to make money. In the past (at that time), one can make money even by planting lemongrass.

S.TRANSL: Then, we went to work to make money. In the past , one can make money even by planting lemongrass.

S.FORM: ma maha ma lqelaq sntuku pila tmabun.
S.PHON: ma maħa ma lqelaq sntuku pila tmabun.

S.TRANSL: 我們去水田工作賺錢.我們在那耕作.
We worked at rice paddies to make money. We plowed.

S.FORM: icinici goen bale uri ka hanmiyan tmabun kiya ma.
S.PHON: iʦiniʦi goen bale uɾi ka ħanmijan tmabun kija ma.

S.TRANSL: 我們在 那邊耕作,一天真的只能賺五塊.

TRANSL.notes: Plowing there (at the rice paddies), we were really making just five dollars a day.

S.TRANSL: Plowing there , we were really making just five dollars a day.

S.FORM: ani so kiya de ininam ininami a sgaliqi ka pila kiya hanmiyan me mege a rudannami a.

S.TRANSL: 即使像那樣,我們也沒有浪費那賺來的錢.而是把錢給了我們的長者.
Despite that, we didn't waste that money. We gave it to our elderlies.

They would buy some things like rice and salt.

S.TRANSL: 他們去買東西,我父母也非常高興.
They bought things, and our parents were very happy.

When I was in the fifth grade, my father passed away.

S.TRANSL: 我的父親是Tado Cili.他那時過世了.
My father was Tado Cili. He passed away.

S.TRANSL: 我就很可憐,只有工作.我就跟隨著媽媽工作.

TRANSL.notes: (After he passed away,) I was so pitiful, so I just workd. Together with my mother, I worked.

S.TRANSL: I was so pitiful, so I just workd. Together with my mother, I worked.

When I finished learning western sewing and came home, I was sixteen years old.

I was about sixteen years old then.

It was November when we got married. I was about sixteen years old in December, and I was married to Awi.

S.TRANSL: 我十七歲的時候生了老大.
When I was seventeen years old, I gave birth to my first child.

S.TRANSL: 我們那時候也過得很辛苦.
We were also having a tough time in those days.

S.TRANSL: 我們沒有和長輩一起,而是自己獨立工作.
We didn't depend on our parents; we worked alone by ourselves.

S.FORM: ga baro nii ka neepahmu a.

S.PHON: ga baɾo nii ka neepaħmu a.

The place where I worked is just up above there.

S.FORM: nosaannami tmukuy a macu ma.

S.PHON: nosaannami tmukuj a maʦu ma.

We went to sow millets.

S.PHON: a wadamijan puqulun ka laqi.
S.FORM: a wadamiyan puqulun ka laqi.
S.PHON: a wadamijan puqulun ka laqi.
S.TRANSL: 我們餵小孩吃飯.
We fed the child.

S.FORM: ma kika ani maanu phumaun kana ani so ppuqun ma so rudan cbeyo so.
S.PHON: ma kika ani maanu pħumaun kana ani so ppuqun ma so ɾudan ʦbejo so.

S.PHON: ma kika ani maanu pħumaun kana ani so ppuqun ma so ɾudan ʦbejo so.
S.TRANSL: 以前的老人家只要可以吃的都種.
People in the past planted everything, as long as its edible.

S.FORM: so a tmurak peni ma kerung ma bunga ma tmurak peni ma kerung ma bunga ma phumaunnami ma.

S.PHON: so a tmuɾak peni ma keɾuŋ ma buŋa ma tmuɾak peni ma keɾuŋ ma buŋa ma pħumaunnami ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們種了像是南瓜、佛手瓜、番薯等等的食物.
We've planted things like pumpkins, chayotes, and sweet potatoes.

S.FORM: ma mesa ka seediq mas manamu masu a mdurumuc riyung mhuma kesaunkudaha.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka seediq mas manamu masu a mduɾumuʦ ɾijuŋ mħuma kesaunkudaħa.

S.PHON: ma mesa ka seediq mas manamu masu a mduɾumuʦ ɾijuŋ mħuma kesaunkudaħa.
S.TRANSL: 有人就對我說:「妳為什麼這麼勤奮的種作物?」
Some people said to me: "Why are you so diligent in plantting?"

S.FORM: kesaunkudaha peni ma ma keyanba durumcsu mhuma sa a.
S.PHON: kesaunkudaħa peni ma ma kejanba duɾumʦsu mħuma sa a.
S.FORM: kesaunkudaha peni ma ma keyanba durumcsu mhuma sa a.
S.PHON: kesaunkudaħa peni ma ma kejanba duɾumʦsu mħuma sa a.
S.TRANSL: 他們對我說:「妳種得好勤奮啊!」
They said to me: "You're so diligent in plantting!"

S.FORM: ma uka so nii laqi mdurumuc mhuma a ppuqun mesa ka seediq.
S.PHON: ma uka so nii laqi mduɾumuʦ mħuma a ppuqun mesa ka seediq.
S.FORM: ma uka so nii laqi mdurumuc mhuma a ppuqun mesa ka seediq.
S.PHON: ma uka so nii laqi mduɾumuʦ mħuma a ppuqun mesa ka seediq.
S.TRANSL: 族人們說:「沒有這麼認真種作物的孩子!」
"There are no other young children that are so diligent in plantting," people said.

S.FORM: kana beluh pais phumaunmu ma baro gaga ma ani kana seediq neeyah iyu a musa lmamu beluh nu pais ma.
S.PHON: kana beluħ pais pħumaunmu ma baɾo gaga ma ani kana seediq neejaħ iju a musa lmamu beluħ nu pais ma.

S.PHON: kana beluħ pais pħumaunmu ma baɾo gaga ma ani kana seediq neejaħ iju a musa lmamu beluħ nu pais ma.

TRANSL.notes: 我連紅豆都種,就在那上面.而且好多來自南山溪部落的族人都去摘(我種的)紅豆.

S.TRANSL: 我連紅豆都種,就在那上面.而且好多來自南山溪部落的族人都去摘 紅豆.

TRANSL.notes: I even plantted adzuki beans, right up there. And all the people from the Iyu tribe went to pick the red beans (that I planted).

S.TRANSL: I even plantted adzuki beans, right up there. And all the people from the Iyu tribe went to pick the red beans .

S.FORM: a kana sunguc tnukuymu ma eyahandaha smebuc pgeeluk smebuc ka seediq anu ka alang iyu hini.
S.PHON: a kana suŋuʦ tnukujmu ma ejaħandaħa smebuʦ pgeeluk smebuʦ ka seediq anu ka alaŋ iju ħini.
S.FORM: a kana sunguc tnukuymu ma eyahandaha smebuc pgeeluk smebuc ka seediq anu ka alang iyu hini.
S.PHON: a kana suŋuʦ tnukujmu ma ejaħandaħa smebuʦ pgeeluk smebuʦ ka seediq anu ka alaŋ iju ħini.
S.TRANSL: 我連樹豆都種.南山部落的族人們也都爭先恐後來採收樹豆.
I even planted tree beans, and the Iyu people rushed here for priority to pick the tree beans.

S.FORM: ma kika mqaras riyung ka bakimu duri a tmukuyku a macu ma.
S.PHON: ma kika mqaɾas ɾijuŋ ka bakimu duɾi a tmukujku a maʦu ma.
S.FORM: ma kika mqaras riyung ka bakimu duri a tmukuyku a macu ma.
S.PHON: ma kika mqaɾas ɾijuŋ ka bakimu duɾi a tmukujku a maʦu ma.
S.TRANSL: 因為我種小米,我祖父也非常高興.
My grandfather was very happy too, since I was plowing millet.

Why am I so pitiful? Why am I so pitiful?

I am so pitiful in this way! I would sing these lyrics up there, and I would cry.

S.TRANSL: 我哭著唱歌,然後就想起了我父母的經歷.但我對爸爸印象並不深,因為他往生時我才五年級.
I sang, crying, and just thought of what my parents had gone through. But I didn't know much about my father, since I was in the fifth grade when he passed away.

S.TRANSL: 我哭泣,因為他們在我還小時就把我嫁出.
I cried, because they made me marry when I was little.

S.TRANSL: 我有七個小孩,兩個往生,活著有五個.
I had seven kids. Two passed away, and five are still alive.

All of my kids are boys, except for just one who is a girl.

Ah, you must wait for me there, the girl with the nest-like hair. Young lady, oh young lady.

S.FORM: nrabe nomin nrabe nomin hesu mtara hesu mtara cceka yayung yayung bnaruy.
S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ħesu mtaɾa ħesu mtaɾa ʦʦeka jajuŋ jajuŋ bnaɾuj.

S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ħesu mtaɾa ħesu mtaɾa ʦʦeka jajuŋ jajuŋ bnaɾuj.
S.TRANSL: Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin! 我會等妳,我會等妳,就在河流的中段,在yayung Bnaruy.
Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin! I will wait for you. I will wait for you, right at the middle part of the river, river Bnarury.

S.FORM: nrabe nomin nrabe nomin hesu pdehuk heku pdehuk mtara hido nii hido runge.
S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ħesu pdeħuk ħeku pdeħuk mtaɾa ħido nii ħido ɾuŋe.
S.FORM: nrabe nomin nrabe nomin hesu pdehuk heku pdehuk mtara hido nii hido runge.
S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ħesu pdeħuk ħeku pdeħuk mtaɾa ħido nii ħido ɾuŋe.
S.TRANSL: Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin. 妳會到達嗎? 我會到達嗎? 我在等著太陽升起,等待著太陽雨.
Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin! Will you arrive? Will you arrive? I am waiting for the sunrise, for the sunshower.

S.FORM: nrabe nomin nrabe nomin ka kmekulan nyami nii heta sterung nkarita nii niya chungii kari na rudan.
S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ka kmekulan njami nii ħeta steɾuŋ nkaɾita nii nija ʦħuŋii kaɾi na ɾudan.

S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ka kmekulan njami nii ħeta steɾuŋ nkaɾita nii nija ʦħuŋii kaɾi na ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin! 沒有人比我們更好.我們必定會相遇,這是我們的約定.別忘記長輩們的話.
Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin! No-one is better than us. We will meet, as this is our promise. Do not forget the words ofthe elderlies.

S.FORM: nrabe nomin nrabe nomin ima pdehuk nali saya lexo rmading lexo rmading nali saya nali saya.
S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ima pdeħuk nali saja lexo ɾmadiŋ lexo ɾmadiŋ nali saja nali saja.
S.FORM: nrabe nomin nrabe nomin ima pdehuk nali saya lexo rmading lexo rmading nali saya nali saya.
S.PHON: nɾabe nomin nɾabe nomin ima pdeħuk nali saja lexo ɾmadiŋ lexo ɾmadiŋ nali saja nali saja.
S.TRANSL: Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin! 今天誰會到達得了? 為何要在今天挑起呢? 為何要在今天挑起呢?
Rabe Nomin, Rabe Nomin! Who shall arrive today? Why start it up, today? Why start it up today?

S.TRANSL: 我又是誰呢?這是我們的了,這是你的了.
Who am I again? This is ours now, and this is yours now.

S.FORM: mtluheta nkari.
S.PHON: mtluħeta nkaɾi.
S.FORM: mtluheta nkari.
S.PHON: mtluħeta nkaɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我們習慣我們的語言.
We are accustomed to our language.

S.FORM: seediqta bi bale.

S.FORM: seediqta bi bale.
S.PHON: seediqta bi bale.
S.TRANSL: 我們是真正的賽德克族人.
We are the true Seediq people.

S.FORM: unnita bi nii da.
S.PHON: unnita bi nii da.
S.FORM: unnita bi nii da.
S.PHON: unnita bi nii da.
S.TRANSL: 這是我們的了.
This is ours now.

S.FORM: ntese blbale.

S.FORM: ntese blbale.
S.PHON: ntese blbale.
S.TRANSL: 居然真的那麼厲害啊!

W.TRANSL: n-和期待相反-處焦.非現實

S.FORM: nali saya da ho.

S.FORM: nita bi mneyah nalangta bi tongan.
